3006050.name: 魔窟のリリアーネ
3006050.description:
Make money by creating zombies!

Liliane, a girl who wants to be a necromancer, creates lots of zombies to earn money to be recognized by her demon lord daddy.
In the morning she has time to work and in the afternoon she has free time.
Sometimes she will mess around with zombies and wolf boys to make boyfriends.
Will you be able to accumulate enough money in a short period of time to become a full-fledged necromancer?

This is a simple simulation game.
Mouse operation is the main.
There are some elements of Otome game.

Estimated playing time: 30 min.
Number of characters: 6
ED: 6~
